ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer communications */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer created their utility account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service the customer receives (residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used by the customer (bank draft, credit card, etc.) */,
  "auto_pay_status" INTEGER /* Whether auto-pay is enabled for the customer's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water usage record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the usage */,
  "meter_reading" TEXT /* Actual meter reading for the billing period */,
  "billing_period" TEXT /* Date of the billing period */,
  "total_gallons_used" INTEGER /* Total gallons of water used during the billing period */,
  "water_service_type" TEXT /* Type of water service used (domestic, irrigation, etc.) */,
  "peak_usage" INTEGER /* Peak hours water usage */,
  "off_peak_usage" INTEGER /* Off-peak hours water usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wastewater_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wastewater usage record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the usage */,
  "meter_reading" TEXT /* Actual meter reading for the billing period */,
  "billing_period" TEXT /* Date of the billing period */,
  "total_gallons_used" INTEGER /* Total gallons of wastewater generated during the billing period */,
  "wastewater_service_type" TEXT /* Type of wastewater service used (domestic, industrial, etc.) */,
  "industrial_wastewater" INTEGER /* Whether the customer generates industrial wastewater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wastewater_usage_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate schedule */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (water or wastewater) */,
  "min_service_fee" TEXT /* Minimum service fee that includes a specified number of gallons */,
  "rate_per_gallon" TEXT /* Rate charged per additional gallon above the threshold */,
  "threshold_gallons" INTEGER /* Number of gallons included in the minimum service fee */,
  "rate_tier_2_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for rate tier 2 (gallons) */,
  "rate_tier_2_rate" TEXT /* Rate for tier 2 */,
  "rate_tier_3_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for rate tier 3 (gallons) */,
  "rate_tier_3_rate" TEXT /* Rate for tier 3 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_records" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the bill */,
  "billing_period" TEXT /* Date of the billing period for the bill */,
  "water_total" TEXT /* Total cost for water usage */,
  "wastewater_total" TEXT /* Total cost for wastewater usage */,
  "total_due" TEXT /* Total amount due for the billing period */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the bill */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Late fee added to the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., bill reminder, high usage alert) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (bank draft, credit card, etc.) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (paid, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_changelog" (
  "rate_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate change record */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rate associated with the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the rate change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (increase, decrease, etc.) */,
  "new_rate" TEXT /* New rate value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_changelog_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES billing_rates ("rate_id")
)
